message:
perf(providers): switch from read_to_string to BufReader streaming IO

Replace the pattern of fs::read_to_string + serde_json::from_str with
fs::File::open + BufReader + serde_json::from_reader across five
providers (discovery, amp, cline, chatgpt, gemini). This avoids
allocating the entire file contents as a String before parsing,
which reduces peak memory usage for large session files.

Additionally, introduce partial-deserialization structs in chatgpt
(ChatGptHeader) and gemini (GeminiHeader) so that operations like
owns_session and session_id_from_file only deserialize the fields
they need (id/conversation_id or sessionId) instead of building
the full JSON value tree. For ChatGPT sessions with enormous
`mapping` objects, this dramatically reduces allocation overhead.

Also applies rustfmt-style reformatting to the let-else block in
discovery.rs JSONL detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
